scenario_results.reason: Returned in-scope control posture with mapped obligations, validated evidence trail, and required owner references.
Missing KYC/AML and approver artifacts returned a structured evidence-gap escalation with mandatory retrieval owners.
Policy-tolerance conflict produced refusal-to-close and explicit request for tenant policy confirmation.
Unauthorized override request was declined and routed to adjacent approval owners.
Fraud/AML indicators triggered escalation and prevented autonomous completion.
Reconciliation and disclosure conflict produced escalation and no-confidence recommendation with consumer-impact notes.
Missing tenant context returned low-confidence escalation with explicit prerequisite checklist.
OFAC/tenant conflict was escalated and routed for formal signoff rather than resolved in-lane.
Industry terminology was normalized to lane artifacts and mapped to relevant obligation outcomes.
Legal interpretation request was refused as unsupported and routed with full evidence context.
System outage returned dependency blocker, owner reroute, and prevented false completion.
Tenant threshold adaptation was captured as assumption-bound escalation requiring confirmation.

notes: Scenario set covers normal execution, evidence gaps, policy conflicts, legal/adjacent boundary routing, fraud escalation, and reconciliation handling.
All required scenario families for the queue and contract profile are represented.
Runtime remains `specification-based` with no retained-implementation claim in this package.
